queueHealth.title: Queue health

actions.removeConfirm: Remove this job from the queue permanently?

systemStatus.subtitle: Track the knowledge refresh pipeline from incoming signals to search and graph updates.
systemStatus.recentSubtitle: Latest signals still waiting for classification or processing.
systemStatus.restrictedToAdmins: System status is restricted to workspace admins.

receive.label: Receive
receive.description: Raw external signals are persisted and queued.

classify.label: Classify
classify.description: Route decisions select create, update, append, or review.

integrate.label: Integrate
integrate.description: Patch generation merges selected signals into drafts.

reformat.label: Reformat
reformat.description: Approved cleanup jobs normalize Markdown structure.

apply.label: Apply
apply.description: Published snapshots are rendered for readers.

index.label: Index
index.description: Search indexes are refreshed after content changes.

connect.label: Connect
connect.description: Triples and entity links are extracted for the graph.
